fields.label: Status
fields.options:
Draft
Commissioner Notified
Employees Notified
Resolved

fields.label: Discovery Date & Time
fields.description: Date and time when the payroll data breach was first discovered (awareness). The 72-hour Commissioner notification countdown starts from this time.

fields.label: Breach Type
fields.options:
Unauthorised Access
Data Loss
Data Theft
System Compromise
Insider Threat
Ransomware
Other

fields.label: Affected Employee Records Count
fields.description: Number of employee payroll records affected by this breach.

fields.label: Data Categories Affected
fields.description: e.g. IC Numbers, Bank Account Numbers, Salary Information, Tax Records, EPF/SOCSO Details

fields.label: Risk Assessment
fields.description: Assessment of the risk posed to affected data subjects. Required for Commissioner Notification Letter.

fields.label: Hours Since Discovery
fields.description: Auto-computed. Commissioner must be notified within 72 hours of discovery.

fields.label: 72-Hour Deadline Status
fields.description: Shows countdown or overdue status for Commissioner notification.

fields.label: Commissioner Notified On
fields.description: Date and time when the PDPA Commissioner was officially notified.

fields.label: Employee Notification Deadline
fields.description: Auto-computed: 7 days after Commissioner notification. Employees must be notified by this date if breach poses significant harm.

fields.label: Employees Notified On
fields.description: Date and time when affected employees were notified.

fields.label: Incident Notes
fields.description: Internal notes and remediation actions taken.
